errors.internal: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

coupons.not_yet_active: This coupon is not active yet.
coupons.below_minimum: Cart subtotal is below the coupon minimum.
coupons.above_maximum: Cart subtotal is above the coupon maximum.
coupons.no_eligible_items: No items in your cart qualify for this coupon.
coupons.only_sale_items: This coupon cannot be combined with sale items.
coupons.individual_use_conflict: This coupon cannot be combined with other coupons.
coupons.email_not_allowed: This coupon is not available for your email address.
coupons.usage_limit_global_reached: This coupon has reached its usage limit.
coupons.usage_limit_per_user_reached: You have already used this coupon the maximum number of times.
coupons.limit_exhausted: This coupon was just used by someone else; please try again without it.
